name: 3b
description: 3b-forge single source of truth. Currently ships the `/3b:interview` Socratic skill plus an optional Python engine for programmatic integrators. Cross-agent: works on Codex, Claude Code, Gemini CLI.

interface.shortDescription: Socratic interview + future 3b skills; cross-agent SSoT plugin.
interface.longDescription: 3b is the consolidated 3b-forge plugin. Today it ships the `/3b:interview` skill — a Socratic interviewer that turns vague requirements into actionable specs via rotating perspectives (researcher, simplifier, architect, breadth-keeper, seed-closer, ontologist). An optional Python engine at `engine/` provides programmatic access with numeric ambiguity scoring and file-locked state persistence for integrators.
defaultPrompt: Use the 3b:interview skill to clarify vague requirements before implementation.
